suite.name: registerUser

test.name: Cadastrar um usuário sem nome sendo um Administrador

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/home/rafael/Documentos/Compass/FrontServeRest-RoboteXpress/logs/browser/traces/temp/1f98cf8c-3602-4300-9a92-ab1f93bb6192"}

kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=ServeRest, url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=https://compassuol.serverest.dev/usuarios path_url=/usuarios headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '102'} body=b'{"nome": "Pedro Souza", "email": "pedro.souza@serverest.com", "password": "", "administrador": "true"}'

/home/rafael/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/urllib3/connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'compassuol.serverest.dev'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.
